propertiesClass.name: tsExample

components.templateData:
Home / Components / Button

Button

Buttons allow users to take actions, and make choices, with a single tap.

@for (tab of tabs; track tab.label) { {{ tab.label }} }
@switch (currentTab()) { @case ('overview') {

Overview

Buttons are used to trigger actions or events. They are one of the most common and essential components in any interface.

Examples

Variants

Buttons come in different styles to communicate the hierarchy of actions.

@for (variant of variants; track variant) { {{ variant }} }

Sizes

Choose the button size that fits your context.

@for (size of sizes; track size) { {{ size }} }

States

Buttons support various states.

Default Hover Active Disabled Loading

Code Example

} @else { 
{{ tsExample }}
}
} @case ('examples') {

Examples

Variants

{{ variant }}
{{ variant }} <pui-button variant="{{ variant }}">
}

Sizes

@for (size of sizes; track size) { {{ size }} }

States and snippets

@for (example of examples; track example.title) {
@if (example.icon) { + New item } @else { {{ example.loading ? 'Saving' : example.disabled ? 'Unavailable' : 'Save changes' }} }

{{ example.title }}

{{ example.description }}

Code 
{{ example.code }}
}
} @case ('api') {

API Guide

Inputs

@for (row of apiRows; track row.name) { }
Input Type Default Description
{{ row.name }} {{ row.type }} {{ row.defaultValue }} {{ row.description }}

Outputs

@for (row of outputRows; track row.name) { }
Output Type Default Description
{{ row.name }} {{ row.type }} {{ row.defaultValue }} {{ row.description }}
} @case ('accessibility') {

Accessibility

Keyboard and screen reader support

  • Uses a native button element for keyboard activation with Enter and Space.
  • Applies visible focus styles through :focus-visible.
  • Sets aria-busy while loading and prevents duplicate activation.
  • Supports ariaLabel for icon-only controls.
  • Disabled and loading states stop events before emitting pressed.
} @case ('theming') {

Theming

CSS variable contract

Button styling is powered by semantic tokens, so consumers can theme globally or override component-level variables in a scoped surface. 

{{ themeCode }}
} @case ('playground') {

Playground

} }

components.templateData:
Home / Components / Card

Card

A composable premium card system for dashboards, SaaS, ecommerce, and media layouts. Build with primitives — never monolithic templates.

@for (tab of tabs; track tab.label) { {{ tab.label }} }
@switch (currentTab()) { @case ('overview') {

Composable architecture

Monthly revenue Updated just now
+18%

$128,430

Premium cards compose from small primitives for scalable SaaS UI. Analytics Open

Primitives

  • pui-card-header, pui-card-title, pui-card-subtitle
  • pui-card-content, pui-card-footer, pui-card-actions
  • pui-card-image, pui-card-badge

Code example

{{ htmlExample }}
} @case ('examples') {

SaaS dashboard

MRR

$84,320

+12% Active users

12,480

Live

Pricing

Pro Popular

$49

per month

 Choose plan 
{{ pricingExample }}

Ecommerce product

Minimal Watch Sale Add to cart 
{{ productExample }}
} @case ('layouts') {

Horizontal layout

Horizontal card Media beside content for list rows and editorial layouts.

Glass premium

Glass surface Subtle blur and layered depth for hero sections.

Loading skeleton

} @case ('api') {

pui-card inputs

@for (row of cardApiRows; track row.name) { }
InputTypeDefaultDescription
{{ row.name }} {{ row.type }} {{ row.defaultValue }} {{ row.description }}

Composable primitives

@for (row of primitiveApiRows; track row.name) { }
ComponentTypeDescription
{{ row.name }} {{ row.type }} {{ row.description }}
} @case ('accessibility') {

Accessibility

  • pui-card-title renders semantic heading text
  • Interactive cards expose role="button", keyboard activation, and focus-visible
  • pui-card-image requires meaningful alt text
  • Loading state sets aria-busy on the card host
} @case ('theming') {

Theming tokens

{{ themeCode }}
@for (variant of variants; track variant) { {{ variant }} {{ variantDescriptions[variant] }} }
} @case ('playground') {

} }

components.name: FoundationDocsComponent

propertiesClass.name: sectionTitle

components.templateData:
Foundations

{{ sectionTitle() }}

Premium UI foundations are semantic, theme-aware, and intentionally small so components stay easy to customize without adopting a heavy styling runtime.

Semantic tokens

@for (token of tokenRows; track token) {
{{ token }}
}

Accessibility notes

Foundation colors are semantic rather than decorative. Components consume text, muted, border, ring, surface, and background roles so light and dark themes retain readable contrast.

@for (tab of tabs; track tab.label) { {{ tab.label }} }
@switch (currentTab()) { @case ('overview') {

Overview

Use the Input component wherever users need to type text, numbers, email addresses, or search queries.

States

Default
Disabled
Read only

SelectDocsComponent

propertiesClass.name: currentTab
declarativeExample
propertiesClass.defaultValue:
`<pui-select
  [value]="selectedFramework()"
  (valueChange)="selectedFramework.set($event)"
  placeholder="Choose a framework">
  <pui-option value="angular">Angular</pui-option>
  <pui-option value="react">React</pui-option>
  <pui-option value="vue">Vue</pui-option>
</pui-select>`

propertiesClass.name: examples
propertiesClass.defaultValue:
[
    {
      title: 'Basic select',
      description: 'Single selection with a declarative options array.',
      code: `<pui-select
  [(value)]="selectedFramework"
  [options]="frameworks"
  placeholder="Select a framework"
/>`,
    },
    {
      title: 'Searchable',
      description: 'Enable local filtering with the searchable input.',
      searchable: true,
      clearable: true,
      code: `<pui-select
  [options]="frameworks"
  searchable
  clearable
  placeholder="Search frameworks"
/>`,
    },
    {
      title: 'Multiple selection',
      description: 'Select multiple values with chip display.',
      multiple: true,
      clearable: true,
      code: `<pui-select
  [options]="countries"
  multiple
  clearable
  placeholder="Select countries"
/>`,
    },
    {
      title: 'Virtual scroll',
      description: 'Render large datasets efficiently with CDK virtualization.',
      virtualScroll: true,
      code: `<pui-select
  [options]="largeDataset"
  virtualScroll
  placeholder="Pick from 10k options"
/>`,
    },
    {
      title: 'Search + virtual scroll',
      description: 'Combine search and virtualization for scalable dropdowns.',
      searchable: true,
      virtualScroll: true,
      clearable: true,
      code: `<pui-select
  [options]="largeDataset"
  searchable
  virtualScroll
  clearable
  placeholder="Search 10k options"
/>`,
    },
    {
      title: 'Loading state',
      description: 'Show a loading indicator while async options resolve.',
      loading: true,
      searchable: true,
      code: `<pui-select
  [options]="options"
  searchable
  asyncSearch
  [loading]="isLoading"
  (searchChange)="loadOptions($event)"
/>`,
    },
  ]

propertiesClass.name: inputRows
propertiesClass.defaultValue:
[
    { name: 'options', type: 'PuiSelectOption[]', defaultValue: '[]', description: 'Array of selectable options with label, value, and optional disabled flag.' },
    { name: 'labelKey', type: 'string', defaultValue: 'label', description: 'Property name used for option labels when options are objects.' },
    { name: 'valueKey', type: 'string', defaultValue: 'value', description: 'Property name used for option values when options are objects.' },
    { name: 'value', type: 'PuiSelectValue', defaultValue: 'null', description: 'Two-way bindable selected value. Use [(value)] for signal-friendly updates.' },
    { name: 'multiple', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Enables multi-select with chip display.' },
    { name: 'searchable', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Shows a search field and enables filtering.' },
    { name: 'virtualScroll', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Virtualizes the option list for large datasets.' },
    { name: 'clearable', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Shows a clear button when a value is selected.' },
    { name: 'disabled', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Disables the select trigger.' },
    { name: 'loading', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Shows loading state in trigger and panel.' },
    { name: 'placeholder', type: 'string | null', defaultValue: 'null', description: 'Placeholder text when no value is selected.' },
    { name: 'itemHeight', type: 'number', defaultValue: '36', description: 'Fixed row height used by virtual scroll.' },
    { name: 'maxPanelHeight', type: 'number', defaultValue: '280', description: 'Maximum dropdown panel height in pixels.' },
    { name: 'size', type: 'PuiSize', defaultValue: 'md', description: 'Controls trigger height and typography.' },
    { name: 'asyncSearch', type: 'boolean', defaultValue: 'false', description: 'Defers filtering to the parent via searchChange events.' },
    { name: 'filterFn', type: 'PuiSelectFilterFn | null', defaultValue: 'null', description: 'Custom local filter function for searchable mode.' },
    { name: 'ariaLabel', type: 'string | null', defaultValue: 'null', description: 'Accessible label for the combobox trigger.' },
    { name: 'emptyMessage', type: 'string', defaultValue: 'No results found', description: 'Message shown when no options match.' },
  ]

propertiesClass.name: themeCode
tsExample

components.templateData:
Home / Components / Select

Select

A feature-driven combobox for single and multi selection with search, virtualization, async loading, and full keyboard support.

@for (tab of tabs; track tab.label) { {{ tab.label }} }
@switch (currentTab()) { @case ('overview') {

Overview

Enable features declaratively through inputs. Combine searchable, multiple, and virtualScroll as needed without separate component variants.

Selected: {{ selectedFramework() }}

Features

  • Single and multi select with clearable values
  • Local and async search with debounced searchChange events
  • Virtual scroll for 10k+ options via Angular CDK
  • Custom option and empty templates
  • Disabled options, loading, and empty states
  • ARIA combobox with active descendant keyboard navigation

Sizes

@for (size of sizes; track size) { }

Code Example

@if (currentCodeTab() === 'html') { 
{{ htmlExample }}
} @else { 
{{ tsExample }}
}
} @case ('examples') {

Examples

Common patterns

@for (example of examples; track example.title) {

{{ example.title }}

{{ example.description }}

{{ example.code }}
}

Parent integration

Selection state is owned by the parent via [(value)], signals, or Angular forms. The trigger label is always derived from the current value — never duplicated internally.

Angular React Vue

Declarative API

{{ declarativeExample }}
Angular React Vue

Multiselect

{{ multiExample }}

ngModel

{{ ngModelExample }}

Reactive forms

{{ reactiveFormExample }}

Signal state

{{ signalExample }}
} @case ('api') {

API Guide

Inputs

@for (row of inputRows; track row.name) { }
Input Type Default Description
{{ row.name }} {{ row.type }} {{ row.defaultValue }} {{ row.description }}

Outputs

@for (row of outputRows; track row.name) { }
Output Type Description
{{ row.name }} {{ row.type }} {{ row.description }}
} @case ('accessibility') {

Accessibility

Keyboard and ARIA

Select implements the ARIA combobox pattern with listbox popup, active descendant management, and full keyboard support.

Key Action
ArrowDown / ArrowUpNavigate options
Enter / SpaceOpen panel or select active option
EscapeClose panel
TabClose panel and move focus
Home / EndJump to first or last enabled option
TypeaheadJump to matching option by label

Provide ariaLabel when the trigger has no visible label. Focus-visible styles use --pui-color-focus-ring for WCAG AA contrast in light and dark themes.

} @case ('theming') {

Theming

CSS variables

Customize appearance without modifying component source using semantic tokens.

{{ themeCode }}

Component-level override

{{ customThemeCode }}
} @case ('performance') {

Performance

Scalable rendering

Enable virtualScroll for large datasets. The panel renders only visible rows via Angular CDK virtual scroll, keeping DOM nodes minimal even with 10k+ items.

  • Features initialize lazily — search UI renders only when searchable and open
  • OnPush change detection with signal-derived filtered options
  • Debounced async search to reduce network and render churn
  • Fixed itemHeight for predictable virtual scroll measurements
} @case ('playground') {

Playground

Interactive preview

Value: {{ playgroundValue() | json }} 

{{ playgroundCode() }}
} }
